microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: The driveItem permissions API returns all sharing permissions to owners, while non-owner callers only receive permissions that apply to the caller.
Microsoft Graph sendMail supports POST /me/sendMail and POST /users/{id|userPrincipalName}/sendMail with Mail.Send as least-privileged delegated and application permission.

Restricted Content Discovery limits discoverability for selected SharePoint sites and explicitly does not change existing permissions, making it an adjacent SAM discoverability control rather than a permission-boundary change.

licenses: Microsoft 365 Copilot license for the validation operator and SharePoint Advanced Management availability when Restricted Content Discovery is evaluated.
roles: SharePoint Administrator for scoped read-only verification steps.
Application administrator approval path for Graph and PnP app permissions.
features: Solution 02 upstream oversharing context is reviewed before running Solution 17 baseline and drift sample steps.
Read-only execution mode with representative sample data only.
capacityRequirements: One disposable validation workspace for baseline and drift sample artifacts.
Operator time for manual portal verification and source read-back.
dataRequirements: Representative baseline and drift sample outputs only; no tenant identifiers or secrets.
prerequisites.notes: If required roles, app permissions, or licensing prerequisites are missing, disposition must be BLOCKED with negative evidence.

steps.intent: Confirm Solution 02 context and Solution 17 prerequisites are documented before sample execution.
steps.expected: Operator confirms upstream dependency context and that this run remains documentation-first and read-only.
steps.operatorNote: Review Solution 02 dependency note and prerequisite readiness in repository docs.

readBack.expectation: Checklist confirms upstream and prerequisite context before sample execution.

phases.title: Run baseline and drift sample workflow

steps.intent: Run New-PermissionsBaseline in documentation-first mode to capture representative baseline output.
steps.expected: Baseline artifacts are produced with representative sample data and no tenant mutation.

readBack.reference: Baseline script output and baseline pointer file
readBack.expectation: Output confirms representative baseline capture and latest-baseline pointer update.

steps.intent: Run Invoke-DriftScan to generate representative drift findings against the sample baseline.
steps.expected: Drift report is generated with sample findings and risk tiers without tenant-bound writes.

readBack.reference: Drift scan script output and drift report JSON
readBack.expectation: Output confirms drift report creation and representative risk classification.

phases.title: Verify Graph, PnP, and blocked prerequisite paths

steps.intent: Verify the driveItem permissions source claim used for read-only permission visibility limits.
steps.expected: Source remains published and aligned with owner versus non-owner permission visibility guidance.

readBack.expectation: Citation confirms owner and non-owner visibility limitations.

steps.intent: Verify sendMail endpoint and Mail.Send permission requirements used by notification workflow documentation.
steps.expected: Source confirms /me/sendMail and /users/{id|userPrincipalName}/sendMail endpoint patterns and Mail.Send least privilege.

readBack.expectation: Citation confirms endpoint and permission details for sendMail.

steps.intent: Confirm BLOCKED disposition handling when role, app-permission, or licensing prerequisites are absent.
steps.expected: Validation run records BLOCKED outcome with negative evidence when prerequisite gates are not satisfied.
steps.operatorNote: Document blocked outcome if required role, Graph permission, or licensing gate is not met.

readBack.expectation: Attestation captures which prerequisite gate blocked execution.

steps.intent: Record cleanup decision for template read-only execution with zero mutations.
steps.expected: Operator attestation confirms no tenant mutation occurred and cleanup is not required.
steps.operatorNote: No mutable operation is defined for this contract.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms read-only execution and no cleanup action.

requiredArtifacts.description: Transcript showing baseline capture and drift scan sample execution.
Source verification capture for driveItem permissions, sendMail, and Restricted Content Discovery references.
Manual attestation that records blocked prerequisite state when role, permission, or licensing gates fail.
